character.definition: clothes made of poor fabric, head-dress for children (or minority group), an infant's bib
(same as 杯 桮) cup; unhappy, displeased, anxious, unsettled

variants.raw_value: 台	臺 檯 颱 台

character.definition: the blood of a sacrificial fowl which was sprinkled on the doors and vessels
(same as 餼) a sacrificial victim, explained as used of the living beast, to bite; to gnaw, to eat to the full; surfeited, a wart; a pimple; a pustule
